engine_note: Blessed 2026-07-04 against the current vector_extract.py / pipeline.py, the trusted post-fix state after commit 81bc3ba (FinaleMaestro SMuFL classification). Partially re-blessed 2026-07-05 for issue #69 (shared-notehead dual stems): 4 divided-staff pieces (finley_complete_liturgy, hilko_star_antiphon: byte-identical, warnings only; theophany_series1: dot de-dup byte change; holwey_divine_liturgy: +0.5% integrity) -- see each piece's per-piece note. Re-bless with UPDATE_EXPECTATIONS=1 or --bless after a deliberate, reviewed engine change -- justify the diff in the commit message. See tests/README.md. Partially re-blessed 2026-07-05 for issue #77 (lyric contamination): 5 pieces change in the LYRIC LAYER ONLY (every tracked stat -- measures, sections, lyric_verses, integrity_pct, note_events_per_voice, warnings_count -- is IDENTICAL; only the emitted <lyric> bytes move). PART C splits internal-hyphen tokens ('Glo-ry' was one token on one note -> 'Glo'/'ry' on two, recovering the dropped second syllable); PART A drops speaker-label baselines ('Deacon:'/'Priest:' + cue); PART D drops all-italic performance directions ('gentle, then build'); PART E drops bracketed rubric blocks ('[At ... Alleluia.]'). See each piece's per-piece note.

trisagion_satb.notes: Small clean 4-staff SATB -- the original bake-off reference piece (docs/choir-training-roadmap.md). RE-BLESSED (beamed-eighth lyric on-beat fix): the Finale flat-beam fix now splits some quarters into beamed-eighth pairs; a syllable whose LEFT edge sits on the on-beat (first) eighth was being center-matched onto the offbeat (second) eighth. _attach_syllable_units now re-anchors a beamed single-syllable pick to the group member nearest the syllable left edge (guarded against occupied heads and cross-barline beam groups), moving these syllables offbeat->on-beat. PDF-verified. Lyric bytes only; no tracked stat moved.

finley_complete_liturgy.notes: Large multi-section, multi-verse-lyric liturgy (sections=22, 371 measures) -- exercises section detection and lyric verse stacking at scale. RE-BLESSED (issue #69, shared-notehead dual stems): MusicXML is BYTE-IDENTICAL (sha unchanged); the divided S+A / T+B staves carry 143 dual-stem noteheads (up-stem + down-stem on one head) whose opposite-direction second stem was previously unclaimed, orphaning its flag. Recovering those second stems lets the flags be claimed, dropping warnings 94 -> 61. Integrity 97.6%, measures 371, and per-voice note counts all unchanged -- only warnings_count moves. RE-BLESSED (issue #77 PART C, internal-hyphen syllable split): 94 contiguously-engraved hyphenated tokens (e.g. 'Glo-ry','A-men.') split into their syllables across the notes under each span; 13 hyphenated words printed over a single note stay merged (lyric_hyphen_merged_melisma=13). Lyric bytes only; measures/sections/integrity/note-counts/warnings all unchanged. RE-BLESSED (issue #82, inline footnote-asterisk over-fire): the old blanket '*' kill dropped two syllabified sung responses that carry an inline reference asterisk -- '*And to thy spir-it. Glo-ry to thee, O Lord, glo-ry to thee.' (p11) and 'To thee, O Lord. A-men. *And to thy spir-it.' (p14). Both are now restored as verse-1 lyric on existing notes; the editorial footnote '* The key was lowered...' (p26, unsyllabified) and '**1. 2. 3.' still drop. Additions only -- lyric bytes change, but measures/sections/lyric_verses/integrity/note-counts/warnings all unchanged.

hilko_star_antiphon.notes: Shared-staff T+B (2-staves-per-system) whole-measure-rest SHRINK case: measures 46 and 48 are genuinely 3.0 beats, and the T/B whole rest is resized down from the 4.0-beat default to match (see the dedicated spot-check in test_regression.py). Also validated byte-identical by the 81bc3ba commit message. RE-BLESSED (issue #69): MusicXML remains BYTE-IDENTICAL (sha unchanged); one shared-notehead dual stem's previously-orphaned flag is now claimed by its recovered second stem, dropping warnings 4 -> 3. Integrity 100%, notes, measures, and the 3.0-beat SHRINK spot-check all unchanged -- only warnings_count moves. RE-BLESSED (issue #77 PART C): 14 internal-hyphen tokens split; the whole-measure-rest SHRINK beat-math spot-check still passes (rhythm untouched). Lyric bytes only; tracked stats unchanged. RE-BLESSED (beamed-eighth lyric on-beat fix): the Finale flat-beam fix now splits some quarters into beamed-eighth pairs; a syllable whose LEFT edge sits on the on-beat (first) eighth was being center-matched onto the offbeat (second) eighth. _attach_syllable_units now re-anchors a beamed single-syllable pick to the group member nearest the syllable left edge (guarded against occupied heads and cross-barline beam groups), moving these syllables offbeat->on-beat. PDF-verified. Lyric bytes only; no tracked stat moved.

joseph_damascus_first_kathisma.notes: Genuine 'FinaleMaestro' SMuFL font (confirmed via embedded font names) revived by commit 81bc3ba; one of the 9 Joseph-of-Damascus booklets that now extract at 100% integrity. Single-voice (monophonic chant transcription), 2 Western pages auto-selected out of a mixed Western/Byzantine-neume booklet. RE-BLESSED (beamed-eighth lyric on-beat fix): the Finale flat-beam fix now splits some quarters into beamed-eighth pairs; a syllable whose LEFT edge sits on the on-beat (first) eighth was being center-matched onto the offbeat (second) eighth. _attach_syllable_units now re-anchors a beamed single-syllable pick to the group member nearest the syllable left edge (guarded against occupied heads and cross-barline beam groups), moving these syllables offbeat->on-beat. PDF-verified. Lyric bytes only; no tracked stat moved.

theophany_series1.notes: Whole-measure-rest GROW case: part P1/P2 measure 36 resizes a whole rest up to 14.0 beats (a 14-beat chant melisma; the exact example in vector_extract.py's whole-measure-rest-normalization comment), P3/P4 measure 38 up to 14.25 beats -- see the dedicated spot-check in test_regression.py. Mixed Byzantine-chant + SATB multi-antiphon booklet. RE-BLESSED for issue #52: the chant-troparia pages are single-staff monophonic systems that the removed vertical-gap heuristic used to fuse into phantom multi-staff systems (Mode A); splitting them back to the single-staff systems actually engraved corrects those pages and renumbers the downstream SATB melisma bars (94 -> 116 measures, GROW spot-check measures 28/30 -> 36/38). Combined with the per-system integrity metric (Mode B) that no longer penalizes the single-voice chant measures against a piece-global 4-voice set, integrity rises 79.8% -> 95.7% (now above the 90% gate, exit 0). The residual failures are genuine SATB-page beat disagreements, still counted. RE-BLESSED again (issue #69, shared-notehead dual stems): a dual-stem dotted-half melisma note on page 8 ('word.') was engraved with a DUPLICATE aug-dot glyph and previously read as double-dotted (3.5); the per-voice dot resolution de-duplicates it to the correct dotted half (3.0), byte-changing only that measure's internal split. All tracked stats are unchanged -- integrity 95.7%, measures 116, warnings 98, note counts, AND the 14.0/14.25 GROW spot-checks at measures 36/38 -- only the sha moves. PDF-verified (pdftoppm p8) as a genuine up+down-stem unison melisma. RE-BLESSED (issue #77 PART C): 15 internal-hyphen tokens split; the whole-measure-rest GROW beat-math spot-check still passes (rhythm untouched). Lyric bytes only; tracked stats unchanged. RE-BLESSED (beamed-eighth lyric on-beat fix): the Finale flat-beam fix now splits some quarters into beamed-eighth pairs; a syllable whose LEFT edge sits on the on-beat (first) eighth was being center-matched onto the offbeat (second) eighth. _attach_syllable_units now re-anchors a beamed single-syllable pick to the group member nearest the syllable left edge (guarded against occupied heads and cross-barline beam groups), moving these syllables offbeat->on-beat. PDF-verified. Lyric bytes only; no tracked stat moved.

holwey_divine_liturgy.notes: Large liturgy, 20 sections detected, 581 measures -- the biggest piece in the corpus, stress-tests runtime and section detection at scale. RE-BLESSED (issue #69, shared-notehead dual stems): 185 dual-stem noteheads on the divided S+A / T+B staves (PDF-verified up+down stems on one head). Resolving their flags/aug dots per voice corrects several unison measures, raising integrity 95.2% -> 95.7% and dropping warnings 84 -> 73; whole_measure_rests_resized falls 2 -> 0 because the corrected beat sums no longer need whole-rest padding. Per-voice note counts and 581 measures unchanged. RE-BLESSED (issue #77 PARTS A/C/D/E): heaviest T/B rubric contamination in the corpus. PART A drops 'Deacon:'/'Priest:' speaker-label baselines (+their spoken cues); PART D drops all-italic 'gentle, then build' directions; PART E drops the '[At ... Alleluia.]' bracketed instruction block; PART C splits 36 internal-hyphen tokens (+14 kept-merged melismas) and RECOVERS ~24 previously-dropped syllables (e.g. the phrase 'Blessed is He that cometh in the'), so P1 v1 grows 1280->1304 lyric tokens. Lyric bytes only; measures/sections/lyric_verses(4)/integrity/note-counts/warnings all unchanged.

cherubic_2staff_reduction.notes: The documented 2-staff choral-reduction case (docs/choir-training-roadmap.md, 'The tie-breaker: the Cherubic Hymn's 2-staff reduction pages'): S+A share the treble staff, T+B the bass, with a mid-piece switch to 4-staff. Voice separation resolved by the per-measure constrained search. 3 known divisi-drop warnings (correction-UI material, not a regression). RE-BLESSED (beamed-eighth lyric on-beat fix): the Finale flat-beam fix now splits some quarters into beamed-eighth pairs; a syllable whose LEFT edge sits on the on-beat (first) eighth was being center-matched onto the offbeat (second) eighth. _attach_syllable_units now re-anchors a beamed single-syllable pick to the group member nearest the syllable left edge (guarded against occupied heads and cross-barline beam groups), moving these syllables offbeat->on-beat. PDF-verified. Lyric bytes only; no tracked stat moved.

finley_little_litany_legacy_maestro.notes: TRUE legacy TrueType 'Maestro' (Sonata-codepoint) font, routed through legacy_glyph_map.json -- contrasts with joseph_damascus_first_kathisma's genuine SMuFL 'FinaleMaestro'. Small, clean, 0 warnings; substituted for the Joseph-Damascus 01-08 set named in the issue brief, none of which currently extract cleanly (all in the known shared-staff voice-beat-reconciliation review pile, exit 2, 0-20% integrity) -- see joseph_01_08_review_pile note below.

receive_ye_tikey_zes.notes: Genuine agreeing 4/4 whole rests: whole_measure_rests_resized=0 (rests already match real content -- the 'genuine full-measure rest' path in vector_extract.py's normalization is a no-op here). Third variant alongside the shrink (hilko_star_antiphon) and grow (theophany_series1) cases.

finley_entrance_hymn_multiverse.notes: Multi-verse standalone piece (lyric_verses=2) -- exercises the verse toggle feature's data path (commit a1d2749) on a small, clean, 0-warning piece. RE-BLESSED (issue #77 PART C exemplar): 'wor-ship' and 'be-fore' were each one token on one note (the trailing syllable's note was empty); now split to 'wor-'(begin)/'ship'(end) and 'be-'(begin)/'fore'(end) across their two notes. Byte change is lyric-only; 0 merged melismas; all tracked stats unchanged.

joseph_01_08_review_pile.explanation: The issue brief's item 8 suggested 'one of the Joseph 01-08 set that's stable' as a legacy-Maestro example. As of this suite's creation, none of 01_joseph-damascus-olihc_1-3-wnbn.pdf .. 08-Joseph-Damascus-Glory-Aposticha-WNBN.pdf extract above 20% measure integrity (all exit 2, all in the known shared-staff voice-beat-reconciliation frontier -- see README.md 'Full-catalog run' notes and issue #52). finley_little_litany_legacy_maestro.pdf was substituted as a stable legacy-Maestro piece instead. Once #52 lands, one of the Joseph 01-08 pieces could be added as an additional corpus entry.
